message:
fix: require space or end-of-string after protocol message type prefix (gt-3kezl)

ParseMessageType used strings.HasPrefix without verifying the prefix is
followed by a space or is the entire string. A subject like "MERGEDFOO"
would incorrectly match TypeMerged, potentially misrouting protocol
messages between Witness and Refinery.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
